federations.name: Namibia Basketball Federation
federations.address: 5th Floor NDC Building, Goethe Street, Windhoek, Namibia. P.O. Box 6203, Windhoek
federations.notes: FIBA official directory; President Nigel Mubita; NNOC affiliated; nbbfline.com may be alternate site

federations.name: Namibia Volleyball Federation
federations.facebook: Integrated with website (specific URL not published)
federations.twitter: Integrated with website (specific handle not published)
federations.notes: NNOC affiliated; Virtual office on website for contact; President Hillary Imbuwa, Secretary General Donald Doesed; contact via website

federations.name: Namibia Darts Association
federations.notes: Phone is Khomas Darts (regional); President Ralph Ludwig; NDF not on NNOC list; no official website found; contact via Namibia Sports Commission or regional darts

federations.name: Namibia Handball Federation
federations.notes: NNOC affiliated; IHF/CAHB member; Facebook is primary web presence per NNOC

federations.name: Karate Namibia
federations.notes: NNOC lists 'Namibia Karate Union' at naku.com.na; PRO Nichol Sibeso; namjkakarate.com is JKA Shotokan (email namjka@afol.com.na, +264 81 257 0309); Okinawa Goju-Ryu: admin@goju-ryu-karate-namibia.com, +264 81 124 2879

federations.name: Billiards & Snooker Namibia (NCSF)
federations.notes: Namibia Cue Sports Federation; President Jannie/Cyril Möller, VP Izaan Möller, Secretary General Laurenzo Louw; no public contact found; contact via Namibia Sports Commission

federations.name: Skateboarding Namibia
federations.notes: Worldskate lists Namibia Ice and Inline Hockey Association (NIIHA) as national roller sports federation; President Matthew Jackman, Secretary Wiebke La Barrè; skateboarding may fall under NIIHA; no separate Skateboarding Namibia federation found
